headline: Every Memory Stock Is Now in a Bear Market: Is Micron, SanDisk, or Applied Materials the Best Buy?
summary: The memory-chip complex has sold off hard from recent peaks. In light of this, investors are asking which of Micron Technology (NASDAQ:MU), SanDisk (NASDAQ:SNDK), or Applied Materials (NASDAQ:AMAT) they should actually own after the drawdown. According to Carson Group chief market strategist Ryan Detrick, from recent highs Micron stock is down 22%, Applied Materials stock ... Every Memory Stock Is Now in a Bear Market: Is Micron, SanDisk, or Applied Materials the Best Buy?

headline: Semiconductor Equipment Stocks Face a Pivotal Test as High Valuations Meet Unmatched Profitability
summary: Semiconductor equipment stocks like ASML, AMAT, LRCX, and TER face high valuations with P/E ratios above 60. Upcoming earnings will test if exceptional profitability and AI-driven demand justify the premium pricing.

headline: 1 High-Flying Stock to Target This Week and 2 We Ignore
summary: “You get what you pay for” often applies to expensive stocks with best-in-class business models and execution. While their quality can sometimes justify the premium, they typically experience elevated volatility during market downturns when expectations change.

headline: Samsung's Blowout Quarter Triggers a Chip Rout, Then Iran Reignites Overnight
summary: Semiconductor stocks got hammered Tuesday after Samsung's record quarter failed to convince investors AI memory demand keeps accelerating, while software names quietly rebounded. Rivian tumbled on a surprise capital raise, Fiserv drew takeover interest, and overnight U.S. strikes on more than 80 Iranian targets pushed oil and gold higher heading into Wednesday's open.
